seoTitle: Castra vs Central Plateau — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Castra and Central Plateau. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Castra vs Central Plateau: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Castra and Central Plateau.
heading: Castra vs Central Plateau — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Castra, Tasmania and Central Plateau, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Castra has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Central Plateau (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Castra or Central Plateau safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Castra has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Central Plateau scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Castra scores 34/100 for bushfire risk. Central Plateau scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Castra or Central Plateau?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Castra has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.73% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
